roa.docketEntryComment: DEF MOTION TO SUPPRESS EVIDENCE, FILED

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/STWPX/X:PRELIMINARY HEARING IS VACATED AT THE REQUEST OF PARTIES,/X:INFORMAL DIVERSION IS GRANTED FOR A PERIOD OF 1 YEAR WITH THE FOLLOWING CONDITIONS:  DEFENDANT MUST SEEK AND MAINTAIN EMPLOYMENT;WRITE AN ESSAY REGARDING GUN SAFETY;  OBEY ALL LAWS;  INCUR NO NEW FILED CASES;/WS/WEAP/X:WEAPON(S) SEIZED IN THIS MATTER TO BE CONFISCATED-DESTROYED UPON COMPLETION OF DIVERSION,/CTORD:ACM TERMINATED/EMTERM/OR/CONTD:INFORMAL DIVERSION PROGRESS REPORT/DOP/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARINGG AND DEFENSE MOTION TO SUPPRESS EVIDENCE/X:COURTGRANTS THE DISTRICT ATTORNEY'S ORAL MOTION FOR CONTINUANCE DUE TO WITNESS UNAVAILABILITY,/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING AND MOTION TO SUPPRESS/DOP/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING AND DEFENSE MOTION TO SUPPRESS EVIDENCE/DAWT/X:THE PUBLIC DEFENDER INDICATES DEFENDANT AUTHORIZED EXTENDING THE 60TH DAY INTHIS CASE,/STIPLD:04-29-22/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING AND MOTION TO SUPPRESS EVIDENCE/DOPC/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW60/LDPX:03-14-22/ACM/WS/WEAP/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THERECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD:SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS WILL PLACE AN ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE ON THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO RELEASE FROM CUSTODY AND WILL PROVIDE ALL INSTRUCTIONS AT THAT TIME,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DOP/
/CAL:INFORMAL DIVERSION PROGRESS REPORT/X:GUN SAFETY ESSAY SUBMITTED TO THE COURT,/CONTD:INFORMAL DIVERSION PROGRESS REPORT AND POSSIBLE DISMISSAL/
/CAL:TO SET/X:THE DEFENDANT APPEARS IN COURT VIA ZOOM,/CONTD:PRELIMINARYHEARING/DOP/
/CAL: PREHEARING CONFERENCE/CONTD: TO SET PRELIMINARY HEARING/DAWF/
